description: Style NoteTake a refined approach to workwear bags with bulchee's Spring '12 line. The line has minimal hardware and are delectably hued (and are crafted from handpicked materials) so you'll want more than just one. Guaranteed to leave you "bag-struck", punctuate your everyday ensemble with this uber cool bag.Product DetailsWine coloured bag with two short handles and one detachable and adjustable shoulder strapOne concealed zipped pocket at the back and two buckle straps at the side for styleOne main zipped compartment with a zipped pocket, two pouches and a zipped separatorMaterial and Care LeatheretteWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not expose to detergents, alcohol or petroleumSizeHeight: 28 cmWidth: 38 cmDepth: 11 cm
